case_for: Ertz has shown week-to-week upside with three games over 12 points in the last six weeks, including a 18.7-point ceiling performance, suggesting he retains scoring potential when targets come his way.
case_against: The extremely low 2.2 PPR pregame projection reflects a diminished role or unfavorable matchup, and his last two games (4.5 and 2.2 points) show a sharp downward trend suggesting fading involvement.
